title: Senior Software Engineer
description_text: We are looking for a Senior Software Engineer to join our Payments Infrastructure team. You will design and build highly reliable distributed systems that process billions of dollars in transactions.

title: Backend Engineer
description_text: Join Notion's backend team to build the infrastructure powering millions of users' notes, databases, and workflows. You'll work on our core data layer using TypeScript and Go.

title: Full Stack Developer
description_text: Linear is building the future of project management. We are looking for a Full Stack Developer who cares deeply about craft and product quality to help us ship features used by the best software teams.

title: Frontend Engineer
description_text: Build the frontend for the platform that powers the modern web. You will work on the Vercel Dashboard and edge tooling, collaborating closely with our design and infrastructure teams.

title: Staff Engineer
description_text: As a Staff Engineer at Figma you will set technical direction across multiple teams, mentor engineers, and drive architecture decisions for our collaborative design platform used by millions.

title: Data Engineer
description_text: Join the team building the most popular data transformation tool in the modern data stack. You will work on our cloud platform, help scale our data pipelines, and contribute to open source.

title: DevOps Engineer
description_text: Help us build and operate the infrastructure behind Terraform Cloud and Vault. You will manage Kubernetes clusters, improve deployment pipelines, and drive reliability engineering initiatives.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description_text: Join Hugging Face to work on the infrastructure and tooling that powers the open-source ML community. You will build systems for model training, inference optimization, and dataset management.

title: iOS Engineer
description_text: Build the iOS app used by hundreds of millions of language learners worldwide. You will own major product features, write Swift code you're proud of, and work closely with our world-class design team.

title: Android Engineer
description_text: Build Shopify's Android app that helps millions of merchants run their businesses. You will work on payments, analytics, and inventory features in a Kotlin-first codebase.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description_text: Keep Cloudflare's global network running at scale. You will work on one of the world's largest distributed systems, own incident response, and build tooling to improve reliability across our edge network.

title: Security Engineer
description_text: Protect the passwords and secrets of millions of users and businesses. You will conduct security reviews, build detection capabilities, respond to incidents, and contribute to our security-first culture.

title: Platform Engineer
description_text: Build the internal developer platform that Datadog's 5,000+ engineers rely on. You will own CI/CD systems, developer tooling, and internal services that make shipping fast and reliable.

title: Engineering Manager
description_text: Lead a team of 6-8 engineers building Loom's video recording and collaboration features. You will hire, grow your team, drive technical strategy, and partner with product and design to ship great experiences.

title: Product Manager
description_text: Define the future of Airtable's app-building platform. You will work with enterprise customers to understand their needs, define roadmaps, and partner with engineering to ship high-impact features.

title: Cloud Architect
description_text: Design the cloud infrastructure strategy for Twilio's communications platform. You will work across AWS and GCP, define reference architectures, and guide engineering teams building at global scale.

title: Data Scientist
description_text: Use data to improve music and podcast recommendations for 600 million listeners. You will build experimentation frameworks, develop recommendation models, and measure the impact of product changes.

title: Senior Backend Engineer
description_text: Build the world's most scalable MySQL-compatible database platform. You will work deep in the Vitess stack, optimize query performance, and build the features that make database branching a reality.

title: UI/UX Designer
description_text: Design intuitive experiences for Webflow's visual web development platform. You will own end-to-end design for core product areas, run user research, and collaborate with engineers daily.

title: QA Engineer
description_text: Ensure the quality of Postman's API platform used by 30 million developers. You will build automated test suites, own release quality, and embed in product teams as a quality champion.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description_text: Build the interfaces that 100 million developers use every day. You will work on GitHub's core web application using React and Ruby on Rails, owning features from design spec to production.

title: Infrastructure Engineer
description_text: Build and scale the infrastructure that runs user applications close to their users. You will work on our global anycast network, bare-metal provisioning, and the systems that make containers fly.

title: Analytics Engineer
description_text: Turn Amplitude's data into actionable insights. You will build dbt models, maintain our data warehouse, partner with go-to-market teams on self-service analytics, and ensure data quality.

title: Software Engineer, Payments
description_text: Build the financial infrastructure that powers Brex's corporate cards and banking products. You will work on payment processing, ledger systems, and the integrations with card networks and banks.

title: Principal Engineer
description_text: Define the technical vision for Retool's internal tools platform. You will set standards, drive cross-team architectural decisions, and be a multiplier for our 200+ person engineering organization.

title: Backend Engineer, Growth
description_text: Drive Calendly's growth through experimentation and activation improvements. You will build A/B testing infrastructure, optimize onboarding flows, and develop the systems behind our freemium funnel.

title: Developer Advocate
description_text: Grow Supabase's developer community and help developers succeed with our open source Firebase alternative. You will create content, speak at conferences, contribute to docs, and build demo projects.

title: Senior Data Engineer
description_text: Build the connectors and pipeline infrastructure that move data for thousands of companies. You will contribute to our open source core, improve connector reliability, and help define the future of ELT.

title: Mobile Engineer
description_text: Build mobile experiences that help millions of people sleep better, reduce anxiety, and be more mindful. You will work across iOS and Android using React Native, owning features end to end.

title: Software Engineer, Core
description_text: Work on Neon's serverless Postgres engine written in Rust. You will build the storage layer, improve cold-start performance, and work on the page server that enables instant database branching.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description_text: Build the banking features that startups rely on to run their finances. You will work across Haskell backend and React frontend, shipping features like wires, ACH, and treasury management.

title: Lead Engineer
description_text: Lead engineering on Liveblocks' real-time collaboration infrastructure. You will design the CRDTs and WebSocket architecture powering collaborative features for thousands of developers' apps.

title: Cloud Engineer
description_text: Build Render's cloud platform used by developers to deploy any app, anywhere. You will work on container orchestration, auto-scaling, networking, and the systems that make zero-downtime deployments work.

title: Senior ML Engineer
description_text: Train and deploy large language models for enterprise use cases. You will work on fine-tuning pipelines, RLHF, model evaluation frameworks, and the infrastructure to serve models at scale.

title: Technical Writer
description_text: Write the docs that help developers integrate authentication in minutes. You will own Clerk's developer documentation, write guides and tutorials, and work closely with the SDK and product teams.

title: Software Engineer, Search
description_text: Improve the search engine trusted by thousands of developers. You will work in Rust on our core search algorithms, indexing pipeline, and ranking system to make Meilisearch faster and more relevant.

title: Senior iOS Engineer
description_text: Build the iOS app for one of Europe's largest fintech apps with 40 million users. You will own features like crypto trading, savings vaults, and the budgeting tools that help users take control of their money.

title: Product Designer
description_text: Shape the future of presentation software. You will design end-to-end experiences for Pitch's collaborative deck editor, conduct user research, and work closely with a tight-knit design and engineering team.

title: Backend Engineer, API
description_text: Build the email API that developers actually love. You will work on deliverability infrastructure, webhooks, the SDKs developers use to send emails, and the dashboard they use to debug them.

title: Software Engineer
description_text: Build the edge SQLite database used by thousands of developers worldwide. You will work in Rust on our libSQL fork, replication engine, and the global infrastructure that puts data close to users.

title: Senior DevOps Engineer
description_text: Operate the error tracking infrastructure that monitors billions of events per day. You will manage Kafka clusters, Clickhouse pipelines, and the Kubernetes infrastructure that keeps Sentry reliable for 90k+ organizations.

title: Software Engineer, Compiler
description_text: Work on the Gleam compiler and language tooling. You will implement language features, improve the type system, build LSP integrations, and help grow one of the most loved languages in the Erlang ecosystem.

title: AI Engineer
description_text: Make AI coding work unbelievably well. You will train and fine-tune models, build evaluation pipelines, and work on the applied AI systems behind autocomplete, chat, and the agent that writes code for you.

title: Full Stack Engineer
description_text: Build the developer platform for running reliable background jobs and workflows. You will work on our Go SDK, the TypeScript client, and the dashboard developers use to debug and monitor their functions.

title: Senior Software Engineer
description_text: Build the world's first cloud computer. You will write Rust at every layer of the stack — from firmware to hypervisor to control plane — on a team that cares deeply about correctness and systems fundamentals.

title: Product Engineer
description_text: Build the productivity tool that developers and designers use to supercharge their workflow. You will work across the macOS native app in Swift and our extensions platform used by 1,000+ community integrations.

title: Backend Engineer
description_text: Build the backend infrastructure for Zed's collaborative code editor. You will work on our Rust server handling real-time collaboration sessions, channel syncing, and the AI features built into the editor.

title: Engineering Manager
description_text: Lead the team building incident management tooling for companies like Etsy, Intercom, and Monday.com. You will manage 5-7 engineers, own a product area, and help scale a fast-growing B2B SaaS company.

title: Software Engineer, Infrastructure
description_text: Build the infrastructure for the workflow engine used by Stripe, Netflix, and Snap. You will work on Temporal's Go-based server, improve persistence backends, and help scale the platform to billions of workflow executions.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer
description_text: Improve the UI development tool used by 1 in 4 professional frontend developers. You will work on the Storybook core framework, addons API, and the integrations with React, Vue, Angular, and Svelte.

title: Desenvolvedor Full Stack Pleno
description_text: Estamos à procura de um Desenvolvedor Full Stack Pleno para integrar nosso time de produto. Você irá desenvolver e manter funcionalidades do nosso sistema de gestão financeira para pequenas empresas, colaborando com designers e outros engenheiros no ciclo completo de desenvolvimento.

title: Ingeniero de Software Senior
description_text: Buscamos un Ingeniero de Software Senior para unirse a nuestro equipo de pagos. Serás responsable de diseñar e implementar soluciones escalables para nuestra plataforma de procesamiento de pagos en México. Trabajarás con tecnologías como Java, Kubernetes y AWS para garantizar alta disponibilidad y rendimiento.

title: Analista Desenvolvedor Java
description_text: Como Analista Desenvolvedor Java você será responsável pelo desenvolvimento e manutenção dos produtos TOTVS, atuando em projetos de alta complexidade. Esperamos que você tenha sólida experiência com Java, Spring Boot e bancos de dados relacionais, além de boa capacidade de trabalho em equipe.

title: Desarrollador Backend Node.js
description_text: En Rappi estamos buscando un Desarrollador Backend con experiencia en Node.js para unirse a nuestro equipo de tecnología. Vas a trabajar en el desarrollo de microservicios que soportan millones de pedidos diarios en toda América Latina. Se requiere experiencia con bases de datos NoSQL y mensajería con Kafka.

title: Engenheiro de Dados Sênior
description_text: O Nubank está contratando um Engenheiro de Dados Sênior para o time de Data Platform. Você vai liderar iniciativas de construção de pipelines de dados em larga escala, trabalhar com Spark, Kafka e Clojure, e colaborar com times de produto e ciência de dados para entregar soluções de alta qualidade.
